mapper.select: /* 기상청 openapi관련 시도 조회 */ SELECT sido , grid_x , grid_y , order_num FROM tb_weather_code WHERE sigungu = '' ORDER BY order_num
/* 기상청 openapi관련 시군구 조회 */ SELECT sido , sigungu , grid_x , grid_y , mid_temp_cd , mid_land_cd , order_num FROM tb_weather_code WHERE sido = #{sido } AND eub = '' ORDER BY sigungu
/* 기상청 openapi관련 읍면동 조회 */ SELECT sido , sigungu , eub , grid_x , grid_y , mid_temp_cd , mid_land_cd , order_num FROM tb_weather_code WHERE sido = #{sido} AND sigungu = #{sigungu} ORDER BY eub
